title: Song: Cultural Day
objectives: Reinforce cultural vocabulary and values through song

key_concepts.explanation:
Verse 1: Today's the day we celebrate, hooray! / So many colours, flags, and friends today. / We walk around the booths, / Learning stories, tasting food / It's Cultural Day, come join the fun and play!

Chorus: Cultural day Cultural day / We share our worlds in a special way. / Different places, old and new, / Cultural Day, together we say yay!

Verse 2: Reem and Noura smile as they explore, / They try new experience. / Omani silver shines, / Egyptian designs / Every booth has something to adore!

Verse 3: Teachers dress in clothes from long ago, / Students learn the things they didn't know. / We listen and we learn, / And respect is what we earn / Our friendship starts to grow and glow.

teaching_notes: Song celebrates cultural diversity and school cultural events. References Omani silver and Egyptian designs — specific Gulf/Arab cultures. Values: respect, learning, friendship across cultures. Good for singing during actual school cultural day events.
